core_logic_signatures.name: __init__
core_logic_signatures.source:
def __init__(self, initial_gamma: float = 0.5, initial_sigma: float = 0.2, dt: float = 1/252):
        self.model = AvellanedaStoikovModel(gamma=initial_gamma, sigma=initial_sigma, T=dt, k=1.5)
        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self.current_gamma = initial_gamma

        # RL-like Policy Parameters
        self.inventory_risk_threshold = 2000 # Units
        self.volatility_threshold = 30.0

core_logic_signatures.note: In a real telemetry pipeline, large functions can be truncated or omitted entirely in favor of the 'ast_hash' to save network bandwidth and storage costs.
